chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI H.C.A. No.388 of 2023 Adnan Ahmed Shaikh Versus Muhammad Raees Date Order with signature of Judge 1. For orders on office objections. 2. For hearing of main case. 3. For orders on CMA 4769/23 Dated: 14.11.2023 Mr. Muhammad Jawed Siddique for appellant. -.-.- Learned counsel, on instructions, does not press instant appeal. Dismissed as not pressed along with listed application. Judge Judge
